channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Awer Mabil named in Australia squad for 2026 World Cup after remarkable refugee-to-pro football journey
item.description: Kenyan-born footballer Awer Mabil has been included in Australia’s final squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, marking his second appearance at the global tournament. Mabil, who was born on 15 September ...

item.title: Government strengthens preparations as Habagat season may coincide with Super El Niño conditions
item.description: Malacañang has announced that the government is ramping up preparations for the potential overlapping impacts of the Southwest Monsoon (Habagat) and a possible Super El Niño event. Palace Press Office...

item.title: Former England and Wales coach John Kear dies aged 71 after Challenge Cup final trip
item.description: John Kear, one of rugby league’s most respected coaches and broadcasters, has died at the age of 71. He passed away on Sunday while returning from the Challenge Cup final at Wembley Stadium, where he ...

item.title: Government intensifies efforts to expand export markets for Tanzania’s cash crops
item.description: The Government of Tanzania is stepping up its efforts to strengthen and expand international markets for the country’s commercial and cash crops, as explained by senior official Dr Mwigulu. The initia...

item.title: New Canadian asylum law leaves some Iranian refugee claimants in legal limbo amid backlog reforms
item.description: Two Iranian women who fled gender-based persecution and political repression in Iran have found themselves in prolonged uncertainty after arriving in Canada, following changes to the country’s asylum ...

item.title: SAFA confirms Bafana Bafana World Cup departure for Monday after visa delays and administrative errors
item.description: The South African Football Association (SAFA) has confirmed that Bafana Bafana’s travel plans for the 2026 FIFA World Cup are back on track, with the team’s chartered flight now scheduled to depart on...

item.title: Australia names 26-player Socceroos squad for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Australia’s head coach Tony Popovic has confirmed the Socceroos’ 26-player squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, featuring a mix of experienced internationals and a large group of debutants. A standout i...

item.title: Comelec conducts testing of 6,500 voting machines ahead of Bangsamoro elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) in the Philippines has undertaken a large-scale pre-election exercise by testing 6,500 voting machines in preparation for the Bangsamoro regional polls. This init...

item.title: Five students file petition for temporary environmental protection order vs San Miguel tree-cutting in Manila
item.description: Five students in the Philippines have filed a petition seeking a temporary environmental protection order (TEPO) against San Miguel Corporation’s tree-cutting activities along Quirino Avenue in Manila...

item.title: Osimhen clears air on absence from Super Eagles, denies any issue with coach Chelle
item.description: Super Eagles striker Victor Osimhen don come out to clear the air after Nigeria head coach Eric Chelle talk about why him no go feature in the upcoming friendly matches against Poland and Portugal. Th...

item.title: Beyond Everest: Exploring Kathmandu’s culture, youth politics and heritage tourism in Nepal
item.description: The article takes Everest Day 2026 as a starting point to shift attention away from overcrowded Himalayan peaks and towards the cultural and social life of Nepal’s valleys, especially Kathmandu. While...

item.title: Heated Rivalry and Nirvanna the Band the Show the Movie dominate highlights of the 2026 Canadian Screen Awards
item.description: The 14th Canadian Screen Awards, held at CBC’s Broadcast Centre in Toronto, delivered a lively but uneven celebration of Canadian film and television, with standout wins and a strong showing for cross...

item.title: Liverpool moves to appoint Andoni Iraola as new head coach after Slot exit
item.description: Liverpool don start to dey arrange proper talks with Andoni Iraola to become their new head coach after dem let go Arne Slot. Dem waka separate from Slot last Saturday, just one year after the Dutch c...

item.title: Dar-Kallas talks highlight Pakistan-EU plans to expand cooperation in trade and diplomacy
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar met European Union’s top diplomat Kaja Kallas in Islamabad, where both sides discussed strengthening Pakistan-EU relations and exploring new areas ...

item.title: Alpha Morgan Bank records N1.9 billion profit before tax within first 10 months of operation
item.description: Alpha Morgan Bank don show strong early performance as dem report Profit Before Tax of N1.9 billion just within their first 10 months of operation. This result stand out for Nigeria banking space, esp...

item.title: CEENET Technologies CEO Kenneth Toroitich Kiplabat found dead after being reported missing in Nakuru
item.description: The search for CEENET Technologies Chief Executive Officer Kenneth Toroitich Kiplabat has ended in deep sorrow after he was confirmed dead following a period of disappearance lasting more than a week....

item.title: Homa Bay Woman Dies after Fire Kills Two Children Amid Marital Dispute
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Homa Bay County when a 30-year-old woman, Veronica Akoth, allegedly set her home on fire, killing two of her children and leaving two others critically injured. Neighbour...

item.title: U.S. Air Force program advances next-generation ceramic materials for aerospace and defense applications
item.description: A new research initiative supported by the U.S. Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL) aims to accelerate the development of next-generation ceramic and ceramic matrix composite (CMC) materials for extr...

item.title: Experts warn Brisbane housing market may face increased downside risks amid tax changes and weaker buyer demand
item.description: A property auction in Brisbane's affluent suburb of Ascot, where a house listed at $3.4 million failed to attract a single bid, has raised concerns about the strength of Australia's housing market. Th...

item.title: A Glimpse of London Life in the Early 1960s Through Vintage Photography
item.description: The early 1960s were a transformative period in London, marking the end of postwar austerity and the beginning of a cultural and social revival. Vintage photos from this era provide an authentic windo...
